items.description: When qualifying alarms trigger, live streams automatically start for all cameras mapped to that alarm. Supports zone-based camera selection, role-based streaming permissions, and comprehensive activity logging for compliance and troubleshooting.
items.title: AutoStream - Automated Video Streaming

items.description: Administrators can configure which alarm types trigger streaming, manage streaming permissions by role, and control zone-based camera selection. All settings are read from and written to Genesis with no local storage.
items.title: AutoStream Settings Management

items.description: When alarms include zone data, only cameras within that zone stream automatically. Unmatched or missing zones fall back to site-level streaming. Zone changes affect future alarms only, ensuring consistent behavior for active events.
items.title: Zone-Based Alarm Routing for Streaming

items.description: New Manage Report Schedules dashboard displays summary cards for active schedules, reports sent this month, and failed deliveries. Users can create, edit, delete, and manually trigger report schedules with configurable customer and site associations.
items.title: Reports Dashboard and Scheduling

items.description: Schedule table provides Edit, Delete, and Trigger actions for report management. Supports pagination with configurable rows per page. Created schedules appear immediately with success confirmation.
items.title: Report Schedule Management Actions

items.description: Motion alarms automatically open the alarm workflow in Talos and load the corresponding alarm quad in Salvo. Behavior controlled by toggle combinations: multi-monitor only, autostream only, or both enabled. Closing workflows or canceling alarms synchronizes quad state across monitors.
items.title: Multi-Monitor Talos-Salvo Integration

items.description: Motion alarms automatically open quad view even when users are viewing other cameras. Quad behavior remains consistent for repeated alarms, and alarm lifecycle (cancel, close, reopen) properly syncs quad state with workflow status.
items.title: Quad View Automation for Motion Alarms

items.description: Device Dashboard displays DC09 Alarm Forward Log section for sites forwarding alarms. Shows comprehensive entry details including time, alarm code, response, encryption status, and routing information. Near real-time updates with success and failure entries.
items.title: DC09 Alarm Forward Logging

summary: This release delivers AutoStream automated video streaming, comprehensive reports management dashboard, and multi-monitor Talos-Salvo integration for enhanced operator workflows.

items.description: Complete RBAC system rework enabling administrators to create roles with hierarchical entity assignments, dynamic privilege filtering, and permission overrides. Includes role cloning, bulk group assignments, and real-time permission enforcement without caching delays.
items.title: Role-Based Access Control System

items.description: Generate unique access tokens for time-limited invitations with automatic session revocation upon expiration. Tokens validate against server time and cannot be reused or extended by client timezone manipulation.
items.title: Time-Based Invitation Access Tokens

items.description: System detects active and upcoming shifts before allowing role modifications. Administrators receive warnings listing impacted users with shift status, and can choose immediate or scheduled application. Audit logs capture all change decisions.
items.title: On-Call Shift Protection for Role Changes

items.description: Administrators can exclude specific privileges from individual users without creating separate roles. Restrictions apply within seconds, persist across sessions, and are captured in audit logs with clear user messaging.
items.title: User-Level Privilege Restrictions

items.description: Marketplace integration for DC09-compatible CMS platforms (Evalink Talos, Amwin, Lisa, Immix, Alice). Supports tenant-level CMS configuration with Company ID and API Token credentials, secure storage, and configuration status tracking.
items.title: DC09 Alarm Management System Integration

items.description: Add DC09 Account ID field to site forms for alarm routing. Supports unique account assignment per site targeting the same CMS, immediate effect on configuration changes, and proper validation for sites forwarding alarms.
items.title: DC09 Site Configuration and Alarm Routing

items.description: Critical fixes for CMS validation errors including mandatory field enforcement, credential format validation, duplicate configuration prevention, and actionable error messaging. Resolves data loss issues on role edits and permission leakage concerns.
items.title: Platform Stability and Regression Fixes

summary: This release introduces a complete Role-Based Access Control system overhaul, DC09 Alarm Management System integration, and critical platform stability improvements.
